schema.description: Request body for playing a VRMA animation.

asset.description:
A strongly-typed asset identifier.

Wraps a `String` but provides type safety so arbitrary strings cannot be
passed where an asset ID is expected. Serializes transparently as a plain
JSON string so the HTTP/JSON API schema is unchanged.
asset.title: AssetId

oneOf.description: Repeat a fixed number of times.

resetSpringBones.description: If true, resets SpringBone velocities to prevent bouncing during animation transitions.

transitionSecs.description: Duration in seconds for the transition of the animation.

waitForCompletion.description: If true, the API will wait until the animation finishes.

schema.title: PlayBody
